headline: Trade Desk (TTD) is Being Highly Favored by Hedge Funds, Here is Why
summary: The Trade Desk Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD) is one of the 8 best advertising agency stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On April 13, Mark Kelley from Stifel reduced the price target on The Trade Desk Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD) from $26 to $25. The analyst maintained his Hold rating on the stock, which still offers double-digit upside […]

headline: The Trade Desk Announces Date of First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Conference Call
summary: LOS ANGELES, April 22, 2026--The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTD), a leading global advertising technology company, today announced that it will release financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026 after the market closes on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The Trade Desk will host a webcast and conference call to discuss first quarter financial results at 2:00 P.M. Pacific Time.
